posts.cookedHtml:
12 posts were merged into an existing topic: Column Color Shading

10 votes have been moved. A vote could not be moved because the user already voted in the other topic.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! We just wanted to let you know that your feature request has been successfully merged into the existing feature request Column Color Shading - #41 by Carson. By merging matching threads we are able to consolidate all the votes for better tracking and prioritization. It’s important to note that if you have voted on multiple threads under the same topic, only one vote will be taken in account. Thank you
